# technitium_zone_dnssec (Resource)

Manages DNSSEC signing for an authoritative zone on a Technitium DNS Server.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `algorithm` (String) DNSSEC algorithm: RSA, ECDSA, or EDDSA.
- `zone` (String) The zone name to sign with DNSSEC.

### Optional

- `curve` (String) Elliptic curve: P256, P384 (ECDSA) or ED25519, ED448 (EDDSA).
- `dnskey_ttl` (Number) TTL for DNSKEY records in seconds.
- `hash_algorithm` (String) Hash algorithm for RSA: MD5, SHA1, SHA256, SHA512.
- `iterations` (Number) NSEC3 iterations.
- `ksk_key_size` (Number) Key Signing Key size in bits (for RSA).
- `nx_proof` (String) Non-existence proof type: NSEC or NSEC3.
- `salt_length` (Number) NSEC3 salt length.
- `zsk_key_size` (Number) Zone Signing Key size in bits (for RSA).
- `zsk_rollover_days` (Number) Number of days between ZSK rollovers.

### Read-Only

- `dnssec_status` (String) Current DNSSEC status of the zone (read from zone options).
